title: Ferry Cross the Mersey
actors: Gerry and the Pacemakers, Mona Washbourne, George A. Cooper
plot: Gerry and Fred Marsden, Les McGuire, and Les "Chad" Chadwick portray themselves in a romp through the early-1960s Liverpool Beat Scene. Art students by day and musicians by night, the boys' big break comes by winning a local talen...
